replies.author: @tjroelsma
replies.text:
The one thing that made pretty much everything after phase 3 so terrible is this insane need of retconning and humiliating all MALE heroes so the terribly mediocre and inconsistent FEMALE heroes could shine. Wanda aka Scarlett Witch was a pretty formidable Avenger before Phase 4, but she became a Goddess after that, with powers that grew, declined and popped out of nothing only to disappear just as fast as the terrible plots needed them to. Black Widow was the exception: she got cucked by her own, previously NON-existent, sister in order for that sister to take over. 
All MALE heroes were easily defeated by 90-pound soaking wet females who looked like they already struggled to lift two pounds of sugar and therefore were totally believable.......

replies.author: @Bonjourpeter23
replies.text:
@skorpion7132the plot is abismal. What are the motivations of Electro and Goblin ? Last time they were unleashed in New York there were several deaths, now we hear nothing about it.
Dr Strange gets character assassinated because he is ready to alternate the reality because he feels bad for one kid, and he doesn’t even explain what he is doing before Peter starts questioning him. The film wouldn’t happen if Stranger was actually smart, or if Peter thought about finding another way to prove Mysterio is a liar (check in Stark Industries archives to find proof Beck was a former employee of Stark Industries, maybe ask the testimonies of his neighbors, his family, or his superiors, search in the recordings of his Spider suit or his glasses…)
Not only that, but Strange could have just pushed the button without coming to Peter, we see that Venom wasn’t even there and yet he was still led back to his universe when Strange casted his spell.
Also, Peter has no real dilemma in this. The villains he saved will still die in their universe, as they were caught moments before their deaths. 
Also, Octopus makes no sense : he says « Obey me ! » to his tentacles, whereas he was the one who was possessed by the tentacles, they retconned his character.
This film is on the same level as the other films of Phase 4, you only find excuses for it because Norman Osborn says « I’m something of a scientist myself » and because Maguire and Garfield joke about shooting webs with their penis.

replies.author: @Bonjourpeter23
replies.text: @skorpion7132I’m not wrong. The plot is full of plot holes and conveniences but you didn’t notice because you were distracted by all the lines stolen from previous Spiderman movies.

replies.author: @americasmostbluntdd
replies.text: ​@Bonjourpeter23 blah blah blah

replies.author: @Bonjourpeter23
replies.text: @americasmostbluntddonly the truth is hurting your feelings.

replies.author: @Bonjourpeter23
replies.text:
@americasmostbluntddWhy does Octopus say « Obey me, don’t obey him ? ». He is supposed to be hypnotized by his tentacles, he should be obeying them. 
Why didn’t Peter try to prove that Mysterio was an employee of Stark Industries ? Why didn’t he ask for the testimony of his superior, his neighbors, his family ? Why didn’t he search for his true identity at the prefecture ? Why didn’t he use the recordings of his glasses ?
Why doesn’t Strange talk to Peter about what he is going to do before casting the spell ? He is a doctor, he should know you don’t operate a patient without explaining everything to him and having his consent.
Why is Strange so invested in modulate the reality of spacetime for a child he knew for two days ? What if in doing so he brings a villain who hurts Christine ?
Why doesn’t the departure of Goblin and Electro create any panic in New York ? Electro has the power to shut down electricity, now that he is angry we should have more damages in New York. Imagine if Peter watches JJ Jameson’s speech and them it is cut off by Electro’s doing.
And why tf is Sandman so dumb in this ? He was in good terms with Peter but in every scenes he’s in, he becomes angry for no reason just to have an action scene.

replies.author: @americasmostbluntdd
replies.text: ​@Bonjourpeter23 nobody gets their feelings hurt over comments on YouTube you're just blabbing

replies.author: @Bonjourpeter23
replies.text:
@americasmostbluntddokay if I’m wrong answer this :
Why didn’t Peter try to prove that Mysterio was a real human guy who worked for Tony Stark ? Couldn’t he have looked at the prefecture to find his real identity ?
Why doesn’t Strange talk to Peter first before wiping out the continuity of space time ? Why is he so invested in helping a boy he knew for two days and who never had a meaningful conversation with him ? 
How does everyone know Nick Fury is off world ? Wasn’t this a secret information kept by Talos ? And what is Talos’ purpose then ?
Why doesn’t Peter show the rush from his suit to prove his innocence ?
Why didn’t Peter ask for Strange about making everyone forget Mysterio’s tape ?
Why is Sandman so angry all the times for no reason ?
Why doesn’t the departure of Goblin and Electro cause more damage in New York ? Electro is on his own and last time he cut the electricity in New York, and here we don’t hear any news.
Why did Strange need Peter to find all the villains whereas he managed to cast the counter spell without Venom and the two other Spider-Man being there ?
What was the purpose of healing the villains when they will die anyway when they are sent back, as they all die second after they were taken ?
Why is Electro here while he didn’t even know Spider-Man’s real identity ?
How is Peter able to get an apartment when everyone forgot him so he doesn’t have any identity registration, assurance, civility, bank account… ?
And I’m not even done, this movie is just silly.

replies.author: @JoakimOtamaa
replies.text: ​@Bonjourpeter23I completely agree with yer take, buddy. Sure it can be silly fun but that's it. Zero rewatchability, MCU ended with Infinity War and even before that, The Wasp and Idiot Ant + Black Panther were just terrible movies.

replies.author: @Simplynothing-e2e
replies.text: Black widow should have had 3 films to tell her story. In the comics she is a supersoldier as well as all the Black widows are. Thats why they are so skilled and can take heavy damage. The first film should have just been about her origin story and her becoming Black Widow. The second and third about saving her sister and destroying the program. The film offers little story or time to breathe and as a black widow comic fan I was disappointed to see them do her like that.

replies.author: @casthedemon
replies.text: ​@Simplynothing-e2ei just wanted a film about what was promised in Age of Ultron. A backstory movie about her growing up in the Red Room without the stupid fucking pheromone nonsense wouldve been great.

author: @25meip
text: The original Mandarin twist STILL could've been interesting if Killian wasn't so lame. Having him scream "I'm the Mandarin" with a flamey fist while everything he used to enact his will was already gone while Tony uses a hundred unmanned suits to fight on his behalf while he says "take away all my tricks and toys and am still iron Man" is just a badly thought through idea. I can imagine the original script had a fantastically grounded ending, but it got "plussed" by Feige and Co.
